feat(granite): Phase 2 CPU-path .runestone writer/reader

- granite::compile(): cold .ndjson.gz → .runestone (zstd+bincode+SHA-256)
- granite::query(): verify SHA-256 → decompress → print events
- Wire format: CHTHONIC magic, 70-byte fixed header, schema+spirv+payload blocks
- Stone/Query subcommands added to trail CLI
- strip_bom refactored to event.rs (pub(crate)), hot.rs/cold.rs updated
- StoneEvent bincode-native wrapper avoids serde skip_serializing_if conflict
- 3 granite tests: roundtrip, tamper-detection, magic-mismatch

commit.message:
fix: Discordニックネーム二重フォーマットバグを修正

Bot APIが独自にニックネームのフォーマット(学籍番号付与等)を行うため、
formatDiscordNicknameで事前フォーマットした名前を送ると
「名前(学籍番号)(学籍番号)」のように二重付与されていた。

全5箇所のsyncDiscordNickname呼び出しを素の名前(姓+名)に変更し、
不要になったformatDiscordNickname関数を削除。

commit.message:
fix: Phase 2 — geo refinement, market default US, dead code cleanup

- Market default: US is now default in both forecast and create selectboxes (was AR)
- Geo refinement: added postal/city/region UI to create section (was forecast-only)
- Geo flow: postal_codes, city_ids, region_ids now passed to push profile builder
- Geo errors: country resolution failures now surface error instead of silent skip
- Dead code: removed generate_io_pdf() (~100 lines, never called, fpdf not installed)
- Retry: advertiser and IO creation now use _api_call_with_retry for 429/5xx resilience
- Deal payload: type_id and auction_type fields added (was missing)
- Supply type: inventory_type_targets enforced on Xandr profile

commit.message:
feat(cli): custom multiline editor — no backslash, no continuation prefix

Replace readline-based prompt() with standalone readMultilineInput():
- ANSI escape rendering: clear-and-redraw input area on every edit
- Clean aligned continuation lines (spaces, not '...' prefix)
- No visible backslash at line ends
- Live in-place editing: backspace across lines redraws properly
- Ctrl+C clears input (with text) or exits (when empty)
- Ctrl+D deletes char or exits on empty
- All editing shortcuts: Ctrl+A/E/U/K/W, arrow keys, Home/End
- Bracketed paste with native multiline support
- Shift+Enter, Alt+Enter, Ctrl+J for newlines
- Tab completion for /commands preserved
- readline kept only for session picker, then closed

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: Resolve security vulnerabilities in dev dependencies

- Add npm overrides for serialize-javascript (>=7.0.5) and diff (>=8.0.0)
  to fix RCE and DoS vulnerabilities in mocha's transitive deps
- Replace deprecated vscode-test with @vscode/test-electron in client
  to fix @tootallnate/once vulnerability (low severity)

All three Dependabot alerts resolved. Dev-only dependencies, not in published extension.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: OpenTelemetry observability and production-ready Helm chart (#22)

* feat: add OpenTelemetry observability and production-ready Helm chart

- Introduced a comprehensive design document for integrating OpenTelemetry (OTel) into the AgentLens application.
- Implemented a telemetry package for tracing, metrics, and structured logging.
- Configured a Helm chart with production-grade features including security, scaling, and PostgreSQL support.
- Established observability features such as OTLP exporters, distributed tracing, and Prometheus metrics.
- Added configuration options for telemetry, including environment variable mappings and defaults.
- Defined instrumentation points for HTTP middleware, health probes, parsers, and store operations.
- Created frontend telemetry integration with dynamic configuration delivery.
- Enhanced testing strategy with unit, integration, and Helm tests to ensure observability features function correctly.
- Documented known traps and architectural decisions to guide future development.

* chore(deps): add OpenTelemetry SDK dependencies

* feat(config): add TelemetryConfig with defaults and env var overrides

* feat(telemetry): add Provider Init and Shutdown with OTLP exporters

* feat(telemetry): add fan-out slog handler for stdout + OTLP (ADR-010)

* feat(telemetry): add store tracing decorator for key catalog operations

* feat(telemetry): add health, parser, auth metric instruments and catalog gauge

* feat(api): add /readyz, /metrics, telemetry config handler and otelhttp middleware

- NewReadyzHandler: database liveness probe (pingFn-based)
- NewTelemetryConfigHandler: public endpoint for frontend OTel bootstrap
- RouterDeps: PromHandler, ReadyzPing, TelemetryEnabled/Endpoint/ServiceName fields
- NewRouter return type changed *chi.Mux → http.Handler (server.New already accepts http.Handler)
- otelhttp.NewHandler wraps entire chi mux as outermost handler
- Added go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/net/http/otelhttp v0.68.0

* feat(main): wire telemetry init, fan-out slog, shutdown, readyz, and version ldflags

* feat(health): add OTel tracing and metrics to health prober

* feat(parsers): add OTel tracing and metrics to A2A and MCP parsers

* feat(auth): add OTel span events and metrics to login handler

* feat(main): wire catalog entry gauge async callback

* chore(arch): add telemetry package to infrastructure layer rules

* chore(docker): use distroless nonroot (UID 65532) and inject version at build

* chore(web): add @opentelemetry/* dependencies for trace propagation

* feat(web): add OTel trace propagation with fetch instrumentation

* feat(helm): update Chart.yaml, full values.yaml, multi-replica guard in helpers

* feat(helm): update core templates — deployment, service, SA, configmap, secret

* chore(make): update helm-lint path/flags, add helm-test target

* test(integration): add Docker Compose + Jaeger OTel integration test

* test(e2e): add OTel smoke tests for /readyz, /healthz, telemetry config

* test(helm): add Helm template test script for all value combinations

Adds multi-replica SQLite guard to deployment.yaml to make test 13 pass.
Fixes helm lint -q flag (helm 3.16 uses --quiet).
Updates CLAUDE.md to clarify rtk applies to scripts too.

* fix(telemetry): reduce Init line count and store tracer public functions for arch-go compliance

* fix(arch): reduce recordProbeMetrics params and Login function length for arch-go compliance

* docs: add telemetry config docs, new endpoints, and Helm chart README

- docs/api.md: Document /readyz, /metrics, /api/v1/telemetry/config
- docs/architecture.md: Add Observability section with OTLP diagram
- docs/settings.md: Add Telemetry configuration table
- deploy/helm/agentlens/README.md: Create Helm chart README

* feat(hooks): add script to patch lefthook-generated git hooks for GOPATH support

* docs(claude): make rtk mandatory for ALL commands with explicit examples

* fix(main): wire TracedStore decorator for store tracing spans

* fix(arch): complete telemetry dependency rules — block auth, db, discovery, plugins

* fix(helm): add --config flag to deployment container args

* feat(telemetry): enhance OpenTelemetry configuration and handling

* fix: address remaining review-thread telemetry and helm issues

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/PawelHaracz/Agentlens/sessions/05efdc88-cf86-440e-8292-822246f37382

Co-authored-by: PawelHaracz <14162492+PawelHaracz@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(api): refine route span naming middleware flow

Co-authored-by: PawelHaracz <14162492+PawelHaracz@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(hooks): add check for perl installation in patch-hooks script

commit.message:
fix: Resolve Kubernetes security check failures in ai-security-collector

Fixes Checkov failures:
- CKV_K8S_31: Add seccomp profile (RuntimeDefault)
- CKV_K8S_38: Disable automountServiceAccountToken
- CKV_K8S_40: Set runAsUser to 10001 (high UID to avoid host conflict)
- CKV2_K8S_6: Add NetworkPolicy for pod network isolation

Changes:
- Updated securityContext with seccompProfile
- Added serviceAccountName and automountServiceAccountToken: false
- Increased runAsUser/fsGroup from 1000 to 10001
- Added NetworkPolicy restricting ingress/egress traffic
- Added ServiceAccount resource definition

All changes maintain functionality while improving security posture.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- semantic_explainer.py: add _call_deepseek() function and branch in _generate()
- base_agent.py: add deepseek branch in _call_llm()
- sacred_sword_analyzer.py: add deepseek client in __init__()
- causal_chain_extractor.py: refactor _build_llm() and _resolve_api_key() to be provider-aware

- .env.example / backend/.env.example: add DeepSeek section, update provider comment

commit.message:
feat: add orphan skill cleanup to sparkdock-agents-sync (#418)

* Initial plan

* feat: add orphan skill and agent cleanup to sparkdock-agents-sync

Add cleanup logic to detect and remove managed resources (skills and
agent profiles) that have been removed from upstream:

- Add manifest_remove() and manifest_list_keys() helper functions
- Add cleanup_orphan_skills() to detect and remove orphaned skills
- Add cleanup_orphan_agents() to detect and remove orphaned agent profiles
- Unmodified orphans are auto-removed; locally modified orphans are
  skipped unless --force is used
- Update print_summary() to include removed resource counts

Update sparkdock-agents-status to flag orphaned resources:

- Managed resources no longer in upstream shown as 'orphan' type with
  'removed from upstream' status (red color)
- Footer hint suggests running sf-agents-refresh to clean up orphans

Update CHANGELOG.md with new feature entries.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/sparkfabrik/sparkdock/sessions/668148ed-6711-4f72-a2d8-14d4ed32e41a

Co-authored-by: paolomainardi <8747+paolomainardi@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs: condense CHANGELOG entries per code review feedback

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/sparkfabrik/sparkdock/sessions/668148ed-6711-4f72-a2d8-14d4ed32e41a

Co-authored-by: paolomainardi <8747+paolomainardi@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address review findings — path traversal, counter conflation, code dedup

🔴 Fix path traversal in cleanup_orphan_skills(): use cd && pwd -P to
resolve both the target path and the base directory, ensuring the
resolved path stays under SKILLS_TARGET_DIR. Blocks symlink escapes
and ../ traversal.

🟡 Fix skipped counter conflation: add separate SKILLS_ORPHAN_SKIPPED /
AGENTS_ORPHAN_SKIPPED counters with distinct "orphan-skipped" line in
summary and separate footer hint for orphan skips vs sync skips.

🟡 Fix code duplication: extract manifest_list_keys() into common/utils.sh
as a shared helper. Replace get_managed_names() in sparkdock-agents-status
and get_managed_skill_names() in skills-symlink-shim.sh (now a thin
wrapper) with the shared function.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/sparkfabrik/sparkdock/sessions/4662dfa6-7dee-49b1-ac6d-e4d26c317bab

commit.message:
Add AgentProcessAware interface and tick-based memory distillation (#343)

* Add AgentProcessAware interface, MemoryDistillation state, and distillation events

- Create AgentProcessAware interface in api module with getAgentProcessId()
- Make AssignedTask implement AgentProcessAware
- Create MemoryDistillation state record implementing AgentProcessAware
- Create MemoryDistillationAwareState interface for state tracking
- Create MemoryDistillationStartedEvent and MemoryDistillationFinishedEvent
- Register new events in AgenticAggregateRuntime, controller, and factory
- Add event-sourcing handlers for new events in handleBuiltInEvent
- Refactor tick logic to operate on AgentProcessAware (both tasks and distillations)
- Update hasActiveAgentTasks to check for active memory distillations

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/elasticsoftwarefoundation/akces-framework/sessions/5ee7912a-d8f4-478c-9f51-34e90b3da936

Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update MemoryDistillationTest for tick-based distillation processing

- Update test state record to implement MemoryDistillationAwareState
- Refactor tests to verify two-phase distillation (started event + tick)
- Add new tests for distillation tick path (limit enforcement, revocation)
- Verify distiller process is NOT run to completion (tick-based now)

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/elasticsoftwarefoundation/akces-framework/sessions/5ee7912a-d8f4-478c-9f51-34e90b3da936

Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address review feedback: integrate MemoryDistillationAwareState into MemoryAwareState, support multiple distillations, add distillationInput to MemoryDistillation, fix javadoc

- Remove MemoryDistillationAwareState interface; merge methods into MemoryAwareState
- Change from single MemoryDistillation to List<MemoryDistillation> (multiple active)
- Add distillationInput (Object) field to MemoryDistillation record for crash recovery
- Fix javadoc errors: replace invalid @link to embabel classes with {@code} references
- Guard startMemoryDistillation with MemoryAwareState check
- Update onMemoryDistillationFinished to remove by agentProcessId
- Update all test implementations of MemoryAwareState
- Rename first-phase test methods to match actual behavior

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/elasticsoftwarefoundation/akces-framework/sessions/2cdb61b4-e64e-4733-a2fc-aa021bb1772c

Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove distillationInput from MemoryDistillation and MemoryDistillationStartedEvent

Per reviewer feedback: the distillation input payload can be huge and may contain
sensitive information. Remove it from both the domain event and the state record.
The distillation process still works correctly via the in-memory AgentProcess but
no longer persists the input data in the event store or aggregate state.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/elasticsoftwarefoundation/akces-framework/sessions/f9800293-bc62-4ec3-a99a-a0763a210402

Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add MemoryDistillationFailedEvent and handle missing AgentProcess after restart

When an AgentProcess can no longer be found on the platform (e.g., after a
restart or crash):
- For AssignedTask: emit AgentTaskFinishedEvent with FAILED status
- For MemoryDistillation: emit MemoryDistillationFailedEvent

This prevents state from getting permanently wedged with orphaned processes
that would cause hasActiveAgentTasks() to return true indefinitely.

New event registered in AgenticAggregateRuntime constants, factory, and
controller BUILTIN_EVENT_TYPES list.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/elasticsoftwarefoundation/akces-framework/sessions/070cc178-bc3f-45f2-87bb-5c6c7db42dda

Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: jwijgerd <914840+jwijgerd@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Joost van de Wijgerd <jwijgerd@gmail.com>

Add GitHub open success feedback

commit.message:
feat(ankh-forge): implement REM Phase 1 trail subsystem (hot/cold/granite stub)

Runestone Execution Model — three-tier typed event trail:
- trail/event.rs: TrailEvent struct with serde + validation
- trail/hot.rs: append, list, verify for .hot.ndjson files
- trail/cold.rs: forge (gzip compress) with round-trip verification
- trail/granite.rs: Phase 2 stub for Vulkan .runestone format
- trail/mod.rs: clap subcommand wiring + trail dir auto-detection

Subcommands: trail append|list|verify|forge
Dependencies added: chrono (serde), flate2

Verified against 19 real events in .chthonic/trail/2026-04-13.hot.ndjson.
All 14 tests pass (11 existing + 3 new).

commit.message:
feat(tensor): implement Stage 1 Tensor Engine

- add workspace Cargo.toml (resolver = "2")
- add crates/tensor-crab with thiserror + rand[small_rng] deps
- implement Storage<T> (Arc-backed ref-counted heap block)
- implement Shape (row-major strides, flat_index, numel)
- implement Tensor<T> struct with constructors:
    from_vec, zeros, ones, full, randn, randn_seeded (Box-Muller)
- implement element-wise ops: add, sub, mul, div (with broadcasting)
- implement scalar ops: add_scalar, mul_scalar
- implement matrix ops: matmul (2D), transpose (zero-copy), reshape, flatten
- implement reduction ops: sum, mean, max, min → scalar [1] tensor
- implement Display trait (recursive N-D pretty printer)
- add IndexIterator for lazy row-major multi-dim index traversal
- 33 unit tests + 20 doc-tests all passing
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo fmt: clean
- cargo doc --no-deps: clean
- update roadmap.md: Stage 1 items checked, status 🟢 Done
- update docs/plan.md: all tensor module rows → 🟢 Done
- update README.md: status banner + progress table

commit.message:
refactor: make rustttwavvv idiomatic for Rust consumers (#5)

* refactor: make rustttwavvv more idiomatic for Rustaceans

- Add Wav::new() constructor and public accessor methods (format_code, sample_rate, channels, bits, samples, samples_mut, into_samples)
- Add SampleRate::new()/value() and Channels::new()/value() accessors
- Add Bits::byte_count() helper method
- Remove dbg! macros from production code
- Replace verbose Into::<T>::into(x) with idiomatic T::from(x)
- Simplify sample byte parsing: use direct slice operations instead of collecting indexes into intermediate Vecs
- Remove strum dependency: replace EnumIter + LazyLock with const array for SUPPORTED_BITS
- Pre-allocate sample Vec with Vec::with_capacity
- Remove unnecessary type annotations and intermediate variables

fix: critical production fixes for leadership review

Phase 1 critical fixes applied on top of remote:
- Sanitizer blocklist: allow deals/bid_object_type for PG/GDALI line items
- PG deal linking: attach deal to guaranteed_delivery LIs (was orphaned)
- Takeover exclusive: set delivery_type=exclusive for GDALI_EXCLUSIVE
- Deal payload: add type_id and auction_type fields
- Supply type: enforce via inventory_type_targets on profile
- Frequency cap: send max_day/lifetime/session_imps to profile
- verify_seat_id: fail closed (return False on error), fix raw auth header
- Push lock: clear _push_in_progress before every st.stop()
- Token expiry: track auth timestamp, auto-reauth after 100min
- Bulk upload: validate rows before queuing, add buyer/auction/pricing fields
- Bulk LI type: derive from LI_TYPE_MAP instead of nonexistent xandr_li_type
- Profile failure: block push for PG/GDALI/Takeover (targeting required)
- Post-push: warn all objects created INACTIVE, need QC activation
- Error sanitization: remove payload leak from profile errors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove redundant path validation on checkpoint save (#10)

The validate_path_components call panicked because checkpoint_path()
returns an absolute path, which SDK v0.1.9 rejects. The path is safe
by construction (built from integer plan_id, no user strings), so
the validation was both redundant and harmful.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Use Docker Hub Trivy image instead of GHCR

- Changed TRIVY_IMAGE from ghcr.io/aquasecurity/trivy:0.69.3 to aquasec/trivy:0.69.3
- Resolves 'manifest not found' error in security-scan workflow
- Docker Hub image is more reliable and doesn't require GHCR authentication
- Maintains same version (0.69.3) for consistency

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix/hovmester verify merge queue (#249)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix example generation: use value instead of pointer for model results in response envelopes (#1912)

* fix: example generation uses value instead of pointer for model results in response envelopes

The byValue parameter was hardcoded to false when generating example
response bodies for non-pageable methods, causing model results to be
rendered with & (pointer) syntax. However, modelResult and
polymorphicResult types are anonymously embedded by value in response
structs. The pageable case already correctly used byValue=true.

Fix: compute resultByValue based on the result kind - only
monomorphicResult uses its own byValue property; all other result
types default to by value.
